title: Teenage Boys Who Raped Girls in Fordingbridge, England, Have Sentences Revised
summary_full: Two teenagers were given four-year custodial sentences on Thursday after an appeals court determined that their earlier sentencing, which included no time in detention, was too lenient.
summary_public: Two teenagers were given four-year custodial sentences on Thursday after an appeals court determined that their earlier sentencing, which included no time in detention, was too lenient.
